title: Raise everyone’s income by $10
textParagraph: If everyone earns an extra $10, the average income increases from $20 to $30, and the Prosperity Gap falls from 4.5 to just over 1. One-third of this change in the Prosperity Gap is driven by an increase in average income; the rest is driven by the reduction in inequality.
source: Authors’ calculation, Poverty and Inequality Platform (version March 2026).
reality: Initial level of income and Prosperity Gap
visdescription: This chart reports the changes in average income and Prosperity Gap for a scenario where everyone’s income is raised by $10.
